title: Villager Knights
description: Guard Villagers with Epic Knights armory
body:
A datapack that adds Epic Knights Weapons, Armour, and Shields to the Guard Villagers from the Guard Villagers mod.

REQUIRED MODS:
- Guard Villagers [fabric/quilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)) | [forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers)
- [Epic Knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons)
 


This datapack has parity with [No More Helpless Guards](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-helpless-guards-(guard-villagers)) and features the same chances for guards to spawn with better gear, but only exclusively from the Epic Guards mod.

Changes:
- Every armor piece has a 20% chance to be enchanted between 15-30 levels
- Every melee weapon has a 20% chance to be enchanted between 3-24 levels
- Guards now have a chance to spawn with all weapons, armor, and shields from Epic Knights
- Adds vanilla bows & axes to weapon pool
- Increased chances for spawning with armor


I didn't include Stone, Wood, Diamond, and Netherite tiers so you don't become too inclined to murder your guards...
